images.description: A silhouette of a person stands beneath a giant, yellow, single eye with a black pupil and white reflection, set against a vivid red background, evoking themes of surveillance and AI oversight.

A stylized, abstract depiction of surveillance with an eye at the center, surrounded by concentric circles of orange and black, flanked by silhouettes of people and a security camera, conveying the concept of AI-driven monitoring and panopticon oversight.
Two surveillance cameras are mounted on a red background, evoking themes of AI-driven brain surveillance and a panopticon system.
